title: chrysanthemum roborowskii
intro: Chrysanthemum roborowskii, also known as the Daurian chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum roborowskii include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
